problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
